description_long: This object is a weathered, upright gravestone or memorial marker made of stone, featuring a rectangular slab with a rounded top. The front face is adorned with an engraved epitaph, decorative reliefs including a winged cherub at the top, and a carved panel with symbolic motifs near the base. The stone is set into a rectangular patch of earth and grass, with a concrete or stone plinth anchoring it to the ground. The rear face also bears inscriptions, though they are more faded and less ornate than the front. The overall appearance suggests significant age, with surface erosion and moss or lichen growth visible along the base.
description: A weathered stone gravestone with engraved inscriptions, a winged cherub relief, and a rectangular base set in grass.
description_view_0: The front view shows detailed inscriptions, a prominent winged cherub relief at the top, and a carved panel near the base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile of the stone and the rectangular base, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays faded inscriptions covering most of the surface, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_3: The right side view again highlights the thinness of the stone and the base, with little surface detail visible.
attribute_inscription: Both the front and rear faces feature engraved inscriptions in English, with the front being more legible and ornate. The text is in a serif style, with some lines larger and more prominent. The rear inscription is faded and less distinct.
attribute_ornamentation: A winged cherub relief is carved at the top center of the front face, and a symbolic panel with motifs is present near the base. No ornamentation is visible on the sides or rear.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple rectangular plinth, slightly raised above the surrounding ground, made of stone or concrete. It is set into a patch of earth and grass, with no decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is gently rounded, following the arch of the upper edge, and features the cherub relief. There are no additional decorations or unique features at the tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of grass and soil, with no other notable features or objects immediately adjacent.
